items.title: [负面] After playing this game for a while, I CANNOT reco...
items.summary:
After playing this game for a while, I CANNOT recommend this game to others in good faith.  

Translation:
The biggest issue I have with this game is the awful GPT translations.  If you're one of those players who leans more into story over game play then I recommend not playing this at the moment.  The lack of proper localized translation makes the story difficult to follow at times.  Dialogue often ends up feeling stiff and clunky, making it hard to actually process most of what happens in the story.  There is a proper localization translation in the works at the moment, but in its current state, the GPT translations is a big no-no for this game.

Story:
As for the story itself, If find it to be decently interesting, but nothing too groundbreaking.  The characters are decently interesting enough, but I honestly had a difficult time getting attached or liking any of them due to the bad GPT translations and lack of voice acting.

Gameplay:
Whens it comes to the game play, it's alright at first but can get somewhat repetitive over time.  Difficulty scaling in this game is also one of the strangest I have seen in a game too.  It isn't too hard to speed run through early game content, but after a while, it gets to point where enemies just become damage sponges that require a lot of damage to kill.  Going back to the repetitiveness, enemies in this game aren't really given unique gimmicks that make fights interesting.  Often time, it just boils down to them dealing a huge chunk of damage every turn while having a super high health pool. What does this mean for the player?  More grinding to get the needed resources for beating these enemies.  Aside from that, gameplay sometimes suffers from lag and stuttering to the constantly high ping.

Gacha System:
While the gacha system itself is unique in the fact that it is a five pull instead of a ten pull, there are still issues with the system.  The divide of characters between permanent and limited without something like the dispense system in Limbus Company or the mileage system in Cookie Run Kingdom has its issues.  While the permanent characters can help players progress through the early game, they will struggle in end game content.  Most are heavily power-crept by the limited characters.  Without the use of limited characters, it becomes very difficult to progress in the game.  The fact that limited characters are limited makes it really difficult to get them at all as they only show in certain banners and once those banners are gone, they're gone until the next rerun.  Thus, it's very easy to put oneself in a situation where they can't progress in the game because they don't have the limited characters to blitz through enemy damage sponges.

Art:
The biggest ups I've had with this game is the art.  It's definitely unique in its own right and carries the game a lot in place of the lack of voice acting.  ALTHOUGH, I do find it difficult to see the so-called "Cthulhu mythos" inspiration in character designs, but maybe that's just me.

Overall, it's difficult for me to call this game a hidden gem when there are better gacha games out there like Limbus Company and Reverse 1999.  Maybe the game will get better in the future, but at the moment, I recommend investing your time in some other gacha game. Hell, maybe trying investing time into a game that isn't a gacha.

items.title: [负面] Concept is solid, but the levels quickly turn into...
items.summary: Concept is solid, but the levels quickly turn into a repetitive task. There's little variety to it with the exception of the different cards, but once you have a strong set, the game is quite easy.

items.title:
[正面] 面白い。

ストーリーは未熟な機械翻訳で魅力がかなり損なわれてるがゲーム部分が遊べて面白い。
ソシャ...
items.summary:
面白い。

ストーリーは未熟な機械翻訳で魅力がかなり損なわれてるがゲーム部分が遊べて面白い。
ソシャゲなので強いと言われてる通常と限定キャラ1人を無料石で取って育てれば無双できる。Slay the Spireが好きで「俺は戦うのが好きなんじゃねぇ勝つのが好きなんだ！」って人は楽しめるんじゃないかな、圧倒的に勝つのは気持ちいい

すでにリリースから約一周年経つからか、初期とはガチャの環境が変わってるらしい？
限定ガチャを回せる石は無料分だけで天井数回できるし、無茶苦茶回せる通常ガチャに古い限定ガチャキャラが入ってる、キャラ凸のアイテムもあり無料の入手手段がある、無課金でもたぶんいける

キャラと装備のガチャがあるけど装備はオマケ程度、このゲームはキャラがメインで所持キャラが重なればそれだけで強くなってカードパワーがガンガン高まります

items.title: [正面] Amazing game. Beautiful music and spooky-fantastic...
items.summary: Amazing game. Beautiful music and spooky-fantastic characters. Turn-based gameplay similar to StS.

items.title: [正面] 游戏性挺好的，玩法上也比较好，但是养成方面有些不怎么好，整体上来说，还行，游戏是个好游戏。

items.title: [正面] why the hell is it so underrated. gorgeous art, am...
items.summary: why the hell is it so underrated. gorgeous art, amazing music, perfect gameplay, touching story. the settings are also unique. and god, the characters are so enchanting. not to mention this game is the kindest to me as an f2p as well. long live morimens.

items.title: [正面] Tried this game on a whim and absolutely fell in l...
items.summary:
Tried this game on a whim and absolutely fell in love with it. The gameplay is interesting and frequently challenging, the characters are wild and colorful and daring in their designs.

The translation does hold the game back some and hopefully that will be fixed in the future! I think the early chapters (1-3) have already been fixed.

items.title: [负面] графомания, перевод нейронкой который даже минимал...
items.summary:
графомания, перевод нейронкой который даже минимально не редактировался, дрочная прогрессия, одна из худших систем гача, много доната + игра постоянно сыпет "выгодные" ограниченные по времени предложение с донатом.
визуально неплохая, интересный геймплей.
в целом ♥♥♥♥♥

items.title: [正面] It's very fun. You can get almost everything f2p, ...
items.summary: It's very fun. You can get almost everything f2p, except for cosmetics and a small part of in-game content. The music and art style are also amazing, and the developers are very responsive to the community. I would say it's an easy 10/10.
